description: Plateforme unifiée supportant traitement bulletins papier ET workflow 100% digital (praticiens + tiers-payant)

tasks.title: Structure Workers Modulaire
tasks.description: Créer structure dossiers modules (core, dhamen, sante), routing modulaire

tasks.title: Router Principal Itty-Router
tasks.description: Router /health, /api/dhamen/*, /api/sante/*, middleware CORS

tasks.title: Middleware Authentification JWT
tasks.description: Génération JWT (jose), vérification, refresh tokens, middleware authMiddleware

tasks.title: Module Santé Router
tasks.description: Routes /adherents/*, /demandes/*, /documents/*, /praticiens/*

tasks.title: Endpoints Adhérents
tasks.description: GET /adherents/:id, GET /adherents/:id/garanties, GET /adherents/:id/plafonds

tasks.title: Endpoint Création Demande
tasks.description: POST /demandes avec validation Zod, insertion D1, historique, notifications

tasks.title: Endpoint Liste Demandes
tasks.description: GET /demandes avec filtres statut/période, pagination

tasks.title: Endpoint Détail Demande
tasks.description: GET /demandes/:id avec documents, historique, garanties

tasks.title: Endpoint Update Status
tasks.description: PATCH /demandes/:id/status (approuver/rejeter), state machine transitions

tasks.title: Endpoint Upload Documents
tasks.description: POST /demandes/:id/documents multipart/form-data vers R2

tasks.title: Endpoint Download Documents
tasks.description: GET /documents/:id/download avec signed URLs R2

tasks.title: WebSocket Durable Object
tasks.description: Notifications temps réel via Durable Objects, WebSocket upgrade

tasks.title: Intégration Notifications
tasks.description: Helper sendNotification, appels depuis création/update demandes

tasks.title: Queue Paiements
tasks.description: Queue consumer pour traitement asynchrone paiements, intégration API bancaire

tasks.title: Utils Database Helpers
tasks.description: Helpers query D1 (execute, first, all), transactions, error handling

tasks.title: Utils Validation Zod
tasks.description: Schemas Zod pour toutes entities, validators emails/téléphones/montants

tasks.title: Utils Generators
tasks.description: Génération références uniques (BH-YYYY-XXXXX), UUIDs, tokens

tasks.title: Utils Encryption
tasks.description: Hash passwords (bcrypt), encryption AES-256, signatures JWT

tasks.title: Rate Limiting KV
tasks.description: Rate limiter avec KV, sliding window, headers X-RateLimit-*

tasks.title: Logging & Monitoring
tasks.description: Structured logging, Analytics Engine, métriques custom

tasks.title: Praticiens Auth
tasks.description: POST /praticiens/register, POST /praticiens/login, JWT séparé

tasks.title: Praticiens Verify Adherent
tasks.description: POST /praticiens/verify avec QR/n_contrat, retour garanties + tiers-payant status

tasks.title: Praticiens Create Acte
tasks.description: POST /praticiens/actes, création demande auto, workflow tiers-payant/remboursement

tasks.title: Workflow Tiers-Payant
tasks.description: Logique calcul parts adhérent/BH, validation tarifs convention, queue paiement praticien

tasks.title: Schema Initial Tables Santé
tasks.description: Tables sante_adherents, demandes, documents, garanties, plafonds, historique

tasks.title: Schema Tables Praticiens
tasks.description: Tables sante_praticiens, sante_actes_praticiens

tasks.title: Extension Tables Partagées
tasks.description: ALTER users (module_access, praticien_id), notifications (module, adherent_sante_id)

tasks.title: Indexes Optimisation
tasks.description: Indexes composites sur queries fréquentes, analyse EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN

tasks.title: Seed Data Garanties
tasks.description: INSERT garanties 3 formules × 6 postes avec taux/plafonds BH

tasks.title: Migration Dhamen vers Santé
tasks.description: Script migration clients Dhamen → sante_adherents, initialisation plafonds

tasks.title: Triggers & Constraints
tasks.description: Triggers auto-update updated_at, constraints CHECK montants/statuts

tasks.title: Backup & Restore
tasks.description: Procédures backup quotidien D1, scripts restore, tests disaster recovery

tasks.title: Configuration Buckets
tasks.description: Créer buckets dev/staging/prod, CORS configuration, lifecycle policies

tasks.title: Upload Helpers
tasks.description: Fonction uploadToR2 avec validation types/taille, retry logic

tasks.title: Download Helpers
tasks.description: Fonction getSignedUrl avec expiration configurable

tasks.title: Delete Helpers
tasks.description: Soft delete (move /deleted/), purge après 30j

tasks.title: Multipart Uploads
tasks.description: Support fichiers >100MB avec chunks, resume upload

tasks.title: Image Optimisation
tasks.description: Compression auto images, génération thumbnails, conversion HEIC→JPEG
26 tâches React Native couvrant setup, navigation, screens, components, services
32 tâches React/Vite couvrant adhérents, gestionnaires, agents, praticiens

tasks.title: Admin Gestion Praticiens
tasks.description: Page admin liste/approuver/éditer praticiens, configurer conventionnée

tasks.title: Onboarding Praticiens
tasks.description: Workflow inscription→validation email→approbation BH

tasks.title: Configuration Tarifs Convention
tasks.description: Interface admin saisie tarifs convention par praticien/acte

tasks.title: Unit Tests Backend
tasks.description: Vitest, tests utils/validation/generators/encryption, coverage >80%

tasks.title: Integration Tests Workers
tasks.description: Tests endpoints auth/demandes/documents, mocks D1/R2

tasks.title: E2E Tests Mobile
tasks.description: Detox, scénarios login→création demande→upload→suivi

tasks.title: E2E Tests Web
tasks.description: Playwright, scénarios adhérent + gestionnaire + praticien

tasks.title: Performance Tests
tasks.description: k6 load tests, vérifier latence <100ms, throughput >1000req/s

tasks.title: Security Tests
tasks.description: Audit npm/pip, tests injection SQL/XSS, permissions, rate limiting

tasks.title: Accessibilité Tests
tasks.description: Audit axe-core, navigation clavier, screen readers

tasks.title: Browser Compatibility
tasks.description: Tests Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge, polyfills si nécessaire

tasks.title: Regression Tests Suite
tasks.description: Suite automatisée cas critiques, intégration CI

tasks.title: User Acceptance Testing
tasks.description: UAT avec vrais adhérents/gestionnaires/agents, feedback itération

tasks.title: Environments Setup
tasks.description: Configurer dev/staging/prod Cloudflare, séparer DB/buckets

tasks.title: CI/CD Workers Pipeline
tasks.description: GitHub Actions deploy-workers.yml, tests→deploy staging/prod

tasks.title: CI/CD Web Pipeline
tasks.description: Deploy Cloudflare Pages, preview PRs, production auto

tasks.title: CI/CD Mobile Pipeline
tasks.description: Fastlane iOS→TestFlight, Gradle Android→Internal Testing

tasks.title: Database Migrations Workflow
tasks.description: Scripts exécution migrations D1, versioning, rollback

tasks.title: Secrets Management
tasks.description: Wrangler secrets, GitHub secrets, rotation régulière

tasks.title: Monitoring Production
tasks.description: Cloudflare Analytics, alertes errors/latency, dashboard métriques

tasks.title: Backup & Disaster Recovery
tasks.description: Backup quotidien D1/R2, procédure restore, tests trimestriels

tasks.title: Health Checks
tasks.description: /health endpoint, vérif DB/R2/AI, monitoring ping 1min

tasks.title: Rollback Strategy
tasks.description: Garder 3 dernières versions, rollback one-click, auto si healthcheck fail

tasks.title: Documentation Deployment
tasks.description: README setup local, guide déploiement, troubleshooting, architecture diagrams

tasks.title: Feature Flags System
tasks.description: Feature flags KV, rollout progressif, kill switch, A/B testing

module_papier.name: Traitement Bulletins Papier
module_papier.description: Adhérents scannent/uploadent bulletins papier, gestionnaires traitent manuellement

module_digital.name: Workflow 100% Digital
module_digital.description: Praticiens créent demandes en ligne, tiers-payant pour conventionnés, remboursement auto pour non-conventionnés
module_digital.workflow_conventionne: Praticien vérifie garanties→Crée acte→Adhérent paie reste à charge→BH paie praticien J+3
module_digital.workflow_non_conventionne: Praticien crée demande→Adhérent paie tout→Remboursement auto adhérent <24h

note: OCR/IA (Phase 2) reportée à plus tard. Focus sur plateforme fonctionnelle avec modules papier + digital simultanés.
